title: Fed Holds Rates Steady, Signals No Rush to Cut
summary: The Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged at 5.25-5.50%, pushing back against market expectations of early rate cuts.

title: Fed Maintains Dovish Pivot, Three Cuts Still Expected in 2024
summary: The Fed held rates steady but the updated dot plot confirmed three rate cuts expected in 2024, boosting risk assets.

title: Fed Signals Potential September Cut as Inflation Cools
summary: FOMC kept rates at 5.25-5.50% but updated language suggests a September cut is likely if disinflation continues.

title: January CPI Hotter Than Expected at 3.1% YoY
summary: Consumer prices rose 3.1% year-over-year in January, above the 2.9% consensus, sending risk assets lower on rate cut delay fears.

title: March CPI Cools to 3.5%, Core Declines
summary: CPI came in slightly below expectations with core declining, reinforcing the disinflation narrative and boosting crypto markets.

title: June CPI Falls to 3.0%, Lowest Since 2023
summary: Consumer price index declined to 3.0% year-over-year, the lowest reading in over a year, strengthening the case for rate cuts.

title: February Jobs Report Shows 275K Added, Unemployment Rises
summary: Non-farm payrolls came in strong at 275K jobs added but unemployment ticked up to 3.9%, sending mixed signals to markets.

title: April Jobs Miss: 175K vs 240K Expected
summary: Non-farm payrolls significantly missed expectations with only 175K jobs added, boosting rate cut hopes and risk assets.

title: SEC Approves 11 Bitcoin Spot ETFs in Historic Decision
summary: The SEC approved all 11 pending Bitcoin spot ETF applications, marking a watershed moment for institutional crypto adoption.

title: Bitcoin Halving Complete: Block Reward Now 3.125 BTC
summary: The fourth Bitcoin halving occurred at block 840,000, reducing the block reward from 6.25 to 3.125 BTC.

title: Ethereum Dencun Upgrade Goes Live, L2 Fees Plummet
summary: The Dencun upgrade successfully activated on Ethereum mainnet, with EIP-4844 blob transactions dramatically reducing Layer 2 fees.

title: Major Solana Token Unlock: 2.5M SOL Released to Market
summary: A scheduled unlock released approximately 2.5 million SOL tokens from early investor vesting, creating sell-side pressure.
